title: Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Batch 4
content_html:
Batch 4: Contract Tests and Stale-Path Guards

This is the delivery specification for Batch 4 in Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Tasks.

Batch 4: Contract Tests and Stale-Path Guards

Summary: Add guard coverage proving Data Sharing is independent of generated publication artifacts.

ID status action
4.1 planned Add focused tests proving selectable records, export/package preparation, source-text extraction, and returned-package review context work when public assets/data/docs/scopes/<scope>/index.json is absent.
4.2 planned Add focused tests proving those same flows work when generated by-id payloads are absent.
4.3 planned Add focused tests or scans proving Data Sharing metadata does not read public nested index-tree.json, search payloads, recently-added payloads, manage/local generated index.json, or generated metadata JSON.
4.4 planned Update existing fixtures in docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_export.py, docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import.py, docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import_service.py, studio/tests/python/test_data_sharing_adapters.py, and related tests so generated docs payload fixtures are used only for Docs Viewer generated-data behavior, not Data Sharing metadata behavior.
4.5 planned Add missing-source, duplicate-doc-id, unresolved-parent, and rendering-error tests with expected user-facing warnings/errors.
4.6 planned Add guard scans for hard-coded assets/data/docs/scopes/<scope>/index.json, docs-viewer/generated/docs/<scope>/index.json, and generated by-id reads in active Data Sharing-owned service paths.
4.7 planned Update any smoke/API tests only when browser or API route behavior changed during Batch 3.
4.8 planned Run focused syntax, pytest, guard scans, and optional smoke checks, then record results and handoff notes for Batch 5.

Steer for these tasks

  • Tests should enforce the current architecture, not preserve historical generated-data shapes.
  • Avoid brittle tests that assert implementation internals unrelated to the Data Sharing boundary.
  • Negative-path tests should fail if generated publication artifacts become required for Data Sharing metadata again.

Deliverables

  • Positive behavior tests without generated publication artifacts.
  • Negative dependency guards.
  • Updated fixtures that distinguish source metadata behavior from Docs Viewer generated-data behavior.
  • Batch 5 handoff with remaining docs and cleanup items.

Implementation and policy guidance

  • Keep permanent tests phrased around the Data Sharing source metadata contract.
  • Do not keep temporary compatibility assertions.
  • Generated publication artifacts may still appear in tests for Docs Viewer publication behavior; the guard applies to Data Sharing metadata workflows.

Proposed verification set

  • $HOME/miniconda3/bin/python3 -m py_compile for changed tests and services.
  • Focused pytest for Data Sharing/export/import source metadata tests.
  • Focused rg stale-path scans against active Data Sharing-owned service paths.
  • Local Analytics/Data Sharing smoke only when API/browser route behavior changes.
  • git diff --check.

completed verification

  • Not started.

follow-on tasks

  • Not started.

task close

  • Add a handoff note to Batch 5.
  • Set this document and the tracker row to done when contract guard coverage passes.
